bugs.fix: Rewrote 54→105 lines (16 removed) | Also: .hero::before,; .hero::after { | Also: border-radius: var(--radius-lg);; .hero-image::before,

bugs.root_cause: border-radius: var(--radius-lg) → var(--radius-md); transition: all var(--transition-base) → rotate var(--transition-base), translate var(--transition-base), box-shadow var(--transition-base)
bugs.fix: Changed border-radius: var(--radius-lg) → var(--radius-md); transition: all var(--transition-base) → rotate var(--transition-base), translate var(--transition-base), box-shadow var(--transition-base)

bugs.root_cause: No early return/throw for edge case: scrollProgress

bugs.error_message: Hero blob parallax never animated (silent no-op)
bugs.root_cause: GSAP cannot tween CSS pseudo-elements; gsap.to('.hero::before'/'.hero::after') selectors match nothing, so the ScrollTrigger parallax on the hero blobs silently did nothing
bugs.fix: Converted blobs to real DOM elements (.hero-blob--green / .hero-blob--pink divs in index.html, classes in styles.css) and retargeted the GSAP tweens to them

bugs.error_message: No dev script found in package.json; Could not start dev server
bugs.root_cause: OpenWolf designqc auto-start expects a package script, but KidsCenter is a dependency-free static site with no package.json
bugs.fix: Started python3 -m http.server 8000 manually and reran designqc with --url http://127.0.0.1:8000

bugs.error_message: 404 seo-monitor.js; Uncaught ReferenceError: module is not defined in lenis.min.js
bugs.root_cause: The page referenced a nonexistent local monitoring script and a Lenis CDN artifact that was not browser-compatible as a classic script
bugs.fix: Removed both stale script tags; the existing native smooth-scroll fallback now handles anchor navigation while GSAP continues to power visual motion

bugs.root_cause: The CLI run-code command was given a raw await expression in a form the wrapper did not accept
bugs.fix: Removed the unnecessary custom wait and used the CLI screenshot command directly for viewport verification

bugs.error_message: Later cards in staggered reveal appeared nearly invisible during design capture
bugs.root_cause: The card entrance animation began every item at opacity 0 and used a long stagger, leaving most of a grid faint during quick scrolling and automated captures
bugs.fix: Kept cards fully opaque and shortened the position/scale stagger while disabling reverse-on-scroll

bugs.error_message: Hero collage collapsed to a 10px-wide sliver on the 390px mobile viewport
bugs.root_cause: All collage photos were absolutely positioned, so the centered hero grid item had no intrinsic width on mobile
bugs.fix: Set width: 100% on .hero-image and .hero-collage, then strengthened the photo crop selector specificity

bugs.root_cause: A negative mousewheel delta was parsed as CLI options
bugs.fix: Used explicit PageUp/PageDown key commands for backward viewport navigation
